canonical_name: Four and a half LIM domains 5
step_rationale: Vascular remodeling and calcification; endothelial and smooth-muscle function in plaque stability.
mechanism: LIM-domain protein regulating vascular remodeling and calcification that influences atherosclerotic plaque stability and cap integrity.

references.title: FHL5 Controls Vascular Disease-Associated Gene Programs in Smooth Muscle Cells.
